SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. THIS CASE IS CONSOLIDATED TO CSM-870507. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ANNA STOFLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL BARRY III IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STOFLE, ANNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARRY III, DANIEL BARRY CONSOLIDATED INTO CSM-25-870507. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
